response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering depth with 21 years of full-stack and systems experience, the Principal Performance Architect role requires specialized expertise in SoC and IP modeling, GPU/accelerator architecture, and deep-learning hardware optimization—none of which are evident in his resume. His background is primarily software-centric (backend services, web platforms, DevOps infrastructure), whereas this role demands deep hardware-software co-design expertise at the silicon level. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work suggests only software-level AI exposure, not the hardware performance profiling and optimization required.
strengths: 21 years of software engineering experience significantly exceeds minimum requirements
Demonstrated system architecture and performance optimization skills across full-stack development
Foundational hardware exposure through embedded systems and D-language low-level programming
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or chip design experience—a required core skill for this role
Missing GPU architecture, accelerator optimization, and deep learning hardware expertise—both required and preferred qualifications
Background is primarily software-level engineering; role requires specialized hardware-software co-design at silicon level
